mobile/components/SettingsScreen.tsx.reason: Existing over-threshold first-party source file at FTY-200 baseline; +4 in FTY-189 publishing the saved goal's direction to the cross-screen goalDirection controller so Trends' headline delta can be goal-aware; +4 in FTY-182 switching the scroll view to the native large-title header's automatic content inset (dropping the hand-padded status-bar magic number) with a comment explaining why; +8 in FTY-190 hydrating the active goal's direction + pace from the extended GET /goal read-model so the collapsed Goal row summarises a returning user's goal as direction + pace on a cold load (pace is recovered server-side from the persisted trajectory, not cached on-device or inferred client-side).

mobile/components/TrendsScreen.test.tsx.reason: FTY-189 adds coverage for the goal-aware headline delta (color + narration across loss/gain/maintain, plus the unknown/no-goal-this-session case rendering neutral rather than a guessed default), range prose, human-formatted dates, and the non-color adherence cue, crossing the 1000-line test threshold; +54 in the FTY-189 review fix for the live-path test that mounts the real screen inside a session + GoalDirectionProvider hydrated from the authoritative GET /goal read, proving a returning user's existing goal colors the delta with no in-session set.

mobile/components/CorrectionSheet.test.t.reason: FTY-181 adds beat-2 (correction-saved haptic) coverage — fires once per successful commit (amount step, re-resolve, override), not on a server failure or a validation error — crossing the 1000-line test threshold.

mobile/components/TodayScreen.test.tsx.reason: Existing over-threshold first-party test file at FTY-200 baseline; +82 in FTY-175 for clarify answer-round-trip coverage (chip resolve, free-text resolve, error path, in-place poll, chip render from payload); +123 in the FTY-175 review fix covering the submit-time question-id re-read (fallback answer resolves after a failed read, re-read failure surfaced, empty-payload honesty); +175 in FTY-197 for the confirm-parsed-values sheet flow (shows the parse + Label scan provenance + not-yet-counted after a legible upload, confirm commits and refreshes totals in place, adjust sends the corrected value, never-silent dismiss leaves an uncounted re-openable proposal, and the unreadable null-proposal path stays unchanged); +112 in FTY-181 for the signature-beat flow tests: beat-1 (entry-resolve haptic — no beat on initial load, exactly one on a pending→completed poll with no re-fire) and beat-3 (target-reached haptic fires once when a summary poll crosses the calorie target through the real mounted hero); +36 in the FTY-181 review fix proving beat-1 fires on the real by-date item feed (server derived items populate the value row, no injected item prop); +52 in the FTY-181 PR-171 review fix for the beat-1 race-guard regression test (a server-fed by-date item on an event the event-list poll still holds pending must not render an un-animated resolved row, and beat 1 fires only once the event list catches up to completed); +41 in the FTY-181 PR-171 review fix for the once-per-event regression test (two pending entries resolving in the SAME reconciliation fire two entry-resolve beats, not one coalesced tap, with no re-fire on a later identical poll).

mobile/components/TodayScreen.tsx.reason: Existing over-threshold first-party source file at FTY-200 baseline; +13 in FTY-178 to mount the hero above the composer and the macro tier separately beneath it (macro rework is FTY-179); +6 in FTY-175 wiring the FTY-170 clarify payload (question id + chips) and the answer round-trip that resolves the same entry in place; +16 in the FTY-175 review fix re-reading the question id at submit time so the free-text fallback stays non-blocking; +1 in FTY-179 passing the daily-summary target read-model into MacroTier so the macro chips measure against their effective targets; +120 in FTY-197 wiring the confirm-parsed-values sheet: reading the FTY-196 label proposal after upload, presenting the sheet, committing the confirmed item into the timeline + refetching the summary in place, and surfacing an undismissed proposal as a re-openable not-yet-counted row; +65 in FTY-181 detecting pending→completed transitions to fire the entry-resolve beat once (soft tap + row fade) and never on initial load; +30 in the FTY-181 review fix loading the FTY-198 by-date item feed so completed entries render their real derived value rows (the entry-resolve beat's real data path); +26 in the FTY-181 PR-171 review fix gating the items-forward fallback to true synthetic saved-food rows (isSyntheticSavedFoodItem) so a server-fed by-date item can only render through the completed branch — closing the race where a resolved row appeared un-animated before the event reached completed; +11 in the FTY-181 PR-171 review fix making the entry-resolve beat once-per-event: a resolveBeatCount advanced by the number of fresh completions each reconciliation, with an effect firing the delta since it last ran, so a poll batch where several entries complete at once beats once per event rather than one tap total.
